title: ilex × attenuata
intro: Ilex × attenuata, also known as the hybrid holly, is a species of flowering plant that combines the characteristics of Ilex opaca and Ilex glabra. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex × attenuata include its potential to protect against infections, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Ilex × attenuata plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
